summary: Made surgical seam edits to better carry chapter 1's hidden second-ping discovery into chapter 2 and to leave Hosuke Takara's reactivated warrant more clearly foregrounded for chapter 3's opening aftermath.
edits: Added an opening callback to the hidden second hello under the dock ping.
Specified the repeated three-knock handshake pattern in Ed's early console scan.
Shifted the closing image to the common-room screen holding Hosuke Takara's reactivated warrant.
